idea.title: Bolt Out
idea.hook: Tap to unscrew colored bolts and drop them into matching boxes — clear every bolt to free the panels.
idea.hook_ru: Нажимай и откручивай цветные болты, отправляя их в ящики по цвету — убери все болты, чтобы освободить пластины.
idea.prototype: Tap-to-unscrew nuts-and-bolts color-sort puzzle: tap an accessible (top-most, unblocked) colored bolt and it spins out into an open box of its color; each box holds 3 same-color bolts then ships out and frees the slot; you have only 3 open box slots; removing the bolts pinning a plate drops the plate to expose bolts beneath; clear all bolts to win the level; box-jam (all slots full + no accessible bolt matches any open box) = lose; 8 levels escalating colors 3->6 and plate layers 2->5; meta unlocks a permanent extra slot, a one-time rescue bin, and a color hint.
idea.why_novel: first tactile unscrew/bolt-sort puzzle in the gallery; box-jam pressure
idea.lose_condition: all boxes full + no accessible matching bolt

sources.title: Спасение уток: Удаление винтов (Yodomi)
sources.snippet: +1636 reviews/30d — unscrew/bolt-removal mechanic surging on Yandex

sources.title: Очистка плиток: Помоги королю (Yodomi)
sources.snippet: same studio launched a 2nd tactile-removal casual ~1h ago

sources.title: Arrow Out (Lion Studios Plus)
sources.snippet: directional-removal puzzle cluster dominating Play puzzle top charts

synthesizer_brief: SIGNAL pick: adapt the surging Yandex unscrew/nuts-and-bolts removal mechanic into an original tap-to-unscrew color-sort puzzle; tap-native, concrete, deep.

alternatives.title: Arrow Out Maze
alternatives.hook: slide directional blocks out without collisions

alternatives.title: Pixel Conveyor
alternatives.hook: tap to send colored pieces onto a conveyor to fill same-color cubes

alternatives.title: Coin Sort Merge
alternatives.hook: sort and merge stacks of coins by color
